# Core HTTP Controllers

Verified controller index for root files in `app/Http/Controllers/*.php` plus the `Auth/`, `Install/`, and `Restaurant/` subfolders.

## Purpose

- Give agents a fast, verified map of the root controller surface.
- Use the grep hint column to jump from a controller name to the owning route declarations quickly.
- Open the section that matches the area first instead of scanning the whole controller tree.

## Root-level controllers

Open [app/Http/Controllers/](../../app/Http/Controllers/) first for non-module controllers that live directly under the root controller directory.

| Controller | Purpose | Grep / route hint |
|---|---|---|
| [AccountController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/AccountController.php) | Accounting account management. | `rg -n 'AccountController' routes app/Providers` |
| [AccountReportsController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/AccountReportsController.php) | Accounting reports and summaries. | `rg -n 'AccountReportsController' routes app/Providers` |
| [AccountTypeController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/AccountTypeController.php) | Account type management. | `rg -n 'AccountTypeController' routes app/Providers` |
| [BackUpController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/BackUpController.php) | Backup creation and restore utilities. | `rg -n 'BackUpController' routes app/Providers` |
| [BarcodeController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/BarcodeController.php) | Barcode generation and printing flows. | `rg -n 'BarcodeController' routes app/Providers` |
| [BrandController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/BrandController.php) | Brand management. | `rg -n 'BrandController' routes app/Providers` |
| [BusinessController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/BusinessController.php) | Business registration, settings, and configuration test actions. | `rg -n 'BusinessController' routes app/Providers` |

| [ContactController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/ContactController.php) | Customer and supplier CRUD, ledgers, and contact feeds. | `rg -n 'ContactController' routes app/Providers` |
| [Controller.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Controller.php) | Base app controller class used by other controllers. | `Not directly routed; search subclasses under app/Http/Controllers and Modules/*/Http/Controllers.` |

## Auth controllers

Open [app/Http/Controllers/Auth/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/) for login, registration, password reset, and verification flows.

| Controller | Purpose | Grep / route hint |
|---|---|---|
| [ConfirmPasswordController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/ConfirmPasswordController.php) | Password confirmation gate before sensitive actions. | `rg -n 'ConfirmPasswordController' routes app/Providers` |
| [ForgotPasswordController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/ForgotPasswordController.php) | Password reset request and email dispatch flows. | `rg -n 'ForgotPasswordController' routes app/Providers` |
| [LoginController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php) | Login and logout flows. | `rg -n 'LoginController' routes app/Providers` |
| [RegisterController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/RegisterController.php) | Registration and first-account setup flows. | `rg -n 'RegisterController' routes app/Providers` |
| [ResetPasswordController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/ResetPasswordController.php) | Reset-token password update flows. | `rg -n 'ResetPasswordController' routes app/Providers` |
| [VerificationController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/VerificationController.php) | Email verification notice, resend, and confirmation flows. | `rg -n 'VerificationController' routes app/Providers` |

## Install controllers

Open [app/Http/Controllers/Install/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Install/) for installer and module-bootstrap flows.

| Controller | Purpose | Grep / route hint |
|---|---|---|
| [InstallController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Install/InstallController.php) | Installer setup steps and bootstrap flow. | `rg -n 'InstallController' routes app/Providers` |
| [ModulesController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Install/ModulesController.php) | Module activation checks during install and update. | `rg -n 'ModulesController' routes app/Providers` |

## Restaurant controllers

Open [app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/) for bookings, kitchen screens, orders, tables, and modifier-set flows.

| Controller | Purpose | Grep / route hint |
|---|---|---|

| [ModifierSetsController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/ModifierSetsController.php) | Restaurant modifier-set management. | `rg -n 'ModifierSetsController' routes app/Providers` |
| [OrderController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/OrderController.php) | Restaurant order and table-service flows. | `rg -n 'OrderController' routes app/Providers` |
| [ProductModifierSetController.php](../../app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/ProductModifierSetController.php) | Product-to-modifier-set assignment flows. | `rg -n 'ProductModifierSetController' routes app/Providers` |
